title: Enchanted Villagers
description: 6 new trade towers! Trade: spawn eggs, Diamond gear to diamonds, and random items!
body:
The Enchanted Villagers mod transforms Minecraft's trading system, giving villagers magical new abilities and expanded trade options. Take your village economy to the next level with these powerful trades!
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
![background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60cb0659e042bbf721ecfb40c2565a9a6d655c3b.jpeg)

All the trader towers can be found on Different oceans:

**1 - trader of spawn eggs ( Deep frozen ocean )**

**2 - trader of items ( Deep frozen ocean )**

**3 -  trader of enchanted ( Ocean )**

**4 - trader of  diamond ( warm ocean )**

**5 - Trader of nature ( beach )**

Spawn high:
Between ( 100 - max 200 )

![trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e618b3fd78530a6ba2819f68907618e0254e41a.png)

![tower one](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bbb6918cb7ed59c3ad0cb93a5417064f375f4c4.png)
![tower two](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bbb6918cb7ed59c3ad0cb93a5417064f375f4c4.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
